THIS MOTION IS UNTIMELY. CRC COMPLIANT NOTICE OF MOTION WAS FILED ON JUNE 14, 2021 FOR JUNE 16, 2021 HEARING. TO THE EXTENT MOVING PARTY ATTEMPTED TO ADDRESS THE DEFICIENCY IN THE ORIGINAL NOTICE OF MOTION POINTED OUT IN OPPOSITION, NO AUTHORITY IS CITED FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT SUCH AMENDMENT IN PROCEDURALLY PROPER. IF THE COURT WERE TO ADDRESS THIS MOTION ON THE MERITS, THE MOTION WOULD BE DENIED. OPPOSING PARTY HAS SUCCESSFULLY SHOWN THAT THE AMOUNT OF SETTLEMENT IS NOT IN THE BALL PARK OF THIS DEFENDANT'S PROPORTIONAL LIABILITY FOR THE DAMAGES CLAIMED BY PLAINTIFF AND THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO ADDRESS SOME OF THE TECH-BUILT FACTORS ALTOGETHER.
